scripts.install:all: cd gateway && npm install && cd ../services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../rbac-service && npm install && cd ../master-service && npm install && cd ../transaction-service && npm install && cd ../../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run start:auth & npm run start:rbac & npm run start:master & npm run start:transaction & npm run start:gateway & npm run start:frontend
